title: Tabs: Visit Multiple Sites
drDigitalIntro: Tabs let you visit multiple websites at once without opening new Safari windows. Click the + button to open a new tab. Each tab shows a different website. Click a tab to switch between them. You can have dozens of tabs open. Close a tab with the X, or press Command+W to close the current tab. Tabs are temporary — when you close Safari, the tabs go away.

playgroundTask.question: Which keyboard shortcut opens a new tab in Safari?

drDigitalSuccess: Command + T — T for Tab! And Command + W closes the current tab.
drDigitalHint: Follow the pattern: Command + the first letter of what you want to do. T for Tab.
